ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager assigned to the store */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the store is closed */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the store */,
  "store_size" REAL /* Physical size of the store */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees currently working at the store */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection for compliance and safety */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store hour entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the store opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the store closes */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the day is a holiday */,
  "holiday_description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_hours_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager ended (if applicable) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the manager works */,
  "manager_level" TEXT /* Level or rank of the manager */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., cashier, stocker) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended (if applicable) */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's shift schedule */,
  "training_completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the employee has completed required training */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product */,
  "last_cost_price" REAL /* Last cost price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  "last_delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the last delivery */,
  "delivery_reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the supplier's deliveries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., in stock, low stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sale has been returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_items" (
  "sale_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale item */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_items_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred store */,
  "communication_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred communication method (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "target_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target store (if applicable) */,
  "target_customer_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment (e.g., loyalty members, first-time buyers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_target_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_products" (
  "promotion_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion product entry */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the promotion */,
  "quantity_limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the quantity of the product that can be purchased under the promotion */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the promotion can be stacked with other promotions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_products_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)
